description.ko: 극한의 수압을 견디고 해저의 고요한 아름다움을 포착하도록 설계된 최첨단 잠수정 AQUA-5와 함께 가장 깊은 해구의 알려지지 않은 비밀을 발견해 보세요.
description.en: Discover the unknown secrets of the deepest trenches with AQUA-5, a state-of-the-art submersible designed to withstand extreme pressure and capture the silent beauty of the ocean floor.

prompt: A cinematic high-tech underwater vessel named AQUA-5, sleek metallic design with bioluminescent cyan accents, navigating the dark midnight zone of the deep ocean, surrounded by glowing jellyfish and hydrothermal vents, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, atmospheric lighting, bubbles and particles floating in the deep sea abyss.
